refnamediv.refpurpose: Reconstruct 3D points from two calibrated views.

listitem.para: Matching 2-D image points from two views, one point per row as [x y].
3-by-4 projection matrices for the two views.
Triangulated 3-D points, one point per row.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Uses OpenCV triangulation with two 3-by-4 projection matrices and matching N-by-2 image points. The result is N-by-3 Euclidean coordinates.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: Function introduced with an OpenCV 5 gateway.
